title: Sera (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sera''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Sera]]''', a resident of [[Carnelion IV]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Sera (scientist)|Sera]]''', a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]
*'''[[Sera Faleur Darklighter]]''', a member of the [[Darklighter family/Legends|Darklighter family]]
*'''[[Sera Fray]]''', a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] scientist
*'''[[Sera Jossi]]''', a business owner
*'''[[Sera Riggers]]''', a member of the [[Executive Secretariat]]
*'''[[Sera Tharen]]''', a member of the [[Tharen family]]
*'''[[Sera Plinck/Legends|Sera Plinck]]''', a martial art

{{Disambig}}
